rows.value: "bacteria slayer" phagocytizing foreign cells, viruses, toxins
attacks parasitic worms and lessons the severity of allergies
Contains histamine(acts as vasodilator, attracts WBC's) and heparin(anticoagulant, promotes mobility of WBC's in area)
destroy cells, T cells and B
become macrophages once they leave blood, phagocytic cells, break down antigens and present them to lymphocytes for recognition
